reviews.comment: The fabric is breathable, perfect for Dhaka weather.
Premium feel for the price, will order again.

name: Signature Drop Shoulder Tee
description: The Signature Drop Shoulder Tee is part of our heritage-inspired collection, made from 180GSM combed cotton for a premium hand-feel. Every detail, from the stitch density to the drape, is engineered for comfort without compromising on a sharp, elevated look.

reviews.comment: Color slightly different from the picture but still nice.

name: Bold Striped Shirt
description: The Bold Striped Shirt is part of our heritage-inspired collection, made from Egyptian cotton for a premium hand-feel. Every detail, from the stitch density to the drape, is engineered for comfort without compromising on a sharp, elevated look.

reviews.comment: Color slightly different from the picture but still nice.
Loved the color, exactly like the photos.
Great value, the gold detailing makes it stand out.
Slightly tight in the shoulders but overall great piece.

name: Minimalist Cargo Pants
description: Made with premium denim, the Minimalist Cargo Pants captures our dark-and-gold design language in a wearable, everyday form. Reinforced seams and a considered fit ensure it performs as well as it looks, season after season.

name: Rugged Henley Tee
